# My Learning Curve

> Personal knowledge base about TypeScript, web engineering, Git workflows, tooling, and reusable snippets.

Canonical site: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve
Sitemap: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/sitemap-index.xml
Detailed guidance: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/llms-full.txt
Markdown alternates: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/<page-id>.md

Use the canonical HTML page as the primary citation target.
If a page exposes a markdown alternate, prefer that alternate for machine-readable extraction.
Respect the crawler policy in robots.txt.

## Priority sections

- Blog: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/blog
- Learn: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/learn
- Reference: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/reference
- Snippets: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/snippets

## Lower-priority sections

- Templates: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/reference/templates
- Tooling setup notes: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/reference/tools
